prompt: A dramatic fantasy illustration of a single female angelic figure made entirely of fire, floating against a pure black background. The body is semi-transparent and sculpted from glowing orange, amber, and white-hot flame, with brighter highlights at the head, chest, knee, and pointed lower leg. She has 2 large feathered wings formed from flame trails, arcing upward behind her back, and long flowing hair that sweeps forward in a blazing halo around her head. Her pose is dynamic and balletic: torso arched, left arm extended outward, one leg bent, the other stretched downward into a tapering flame point, as if descending or diving through the air. The figure wears the suggestion of a short dress or skirt shape also formed from fire. Surround the body with turbulent smoke-like flame ribbons and motion streaks, especially trailing behind the wings and around the lower half, creating a sense of speed and supernatural energy. High contrast, luminous edges, ethereal anatomy, no ground, no props, no text, centered vertical composition, cinematic fantasy fire spirit aesthetic.
